title: MongoDB Q1 FY2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: MongoDB Q1 FY2023 generated total revenue of $285.4 million, up 57% year-over-year. Atlas revenue grew 82% YoY, representing 60% of total revenue. Enterprise Advanced product grew 30% YoY. Total customers reached 35,200+, up from 26,800 YoY. Direct sales customers totaled 4,800+, up from 3,300 YoY. Customers with $100k+ ARR reached 1,379, up from 1,057. Net ARR expansion rate remained above 120%. Gross margin improved to 75%, up from 72% YoY. Operating margin turned positive at 6%, versus negative 2% YoY. Net income reached $15.2 million with $0.20 per share. Q2 2023 guidance included revenue of $279-282 million and non-GAAP net loss per share of $(0.31) to $(0.28). Full year FY2023 guidance: Revenue $1.172-1.192 billion, Non-GAAP net income/loss from operations $(9) million to $1 million, Non-GAAP net loss per share $(0.31) to $(0.16). Management acknowledged slower-than-normal expansion of existing customers in self-serve and mid-market segments, particularly in Europe. However, they reported strong new customer acquisition with no churn increases.
